meaning: n.[化]双光气(作战用之毒气)
examples: Scanning electron microscope and transmissional electron microscope were used to observe the ultrastructural changes of respiratory tract in rabbits inhaling low concentration of diphosgene.
The triphosgene, being as the substitute for phosgene and diphosgene in synthesis, is not only low-toxic but also safe and convenient to use with mild conditions, good selectivity and high yields.
